title: What Are Planets Made Of?
description: 2 planets and what they are made of

prompts.input: How would you explain what the Earth and Mars are made of? Why do you think their materials are important?
hints: Think about the different layers of Earth and Mars.
Consider how these materials help support life or create conditions on each planet.

assessment.learningObjective: Explains what Earth and Mars are made of and why those materials are important.
expectedConcepts: Describes that Earth is made of rock and metal.
States that Mars is made of rock and has some ice.
Explains why the materials of Earth and Mars are important for life and exploration.
assessment.requiredExamples: Mentions at least two materials for Earth and Mars and explains their importance.
misconceptions: Thinks Earth and Mars are made of the same materials.
Believes that Mars has no materials at all.
Considers that the materials of planets do not affect life.

scoringLevels.strong: Includes all key concepts with specific examples of materials and their importance.
scoringLevels.developing: Mentions some materials but misses one key concept or example.
scoringLevels.needsSupport: Gives incorrect facts about the materials or does not answer the question.

successCriteria: Describes that Earth is made of rock and metal.
States that Mars is made of rock and has some ice.
Explains why the materials of Earth and Mars are important for life and exploration.
Mentions at least two materials for Earth and Mars and explains their importance.

subject: Science
